prompt: Use @image1 and @image2 ONLY as strict style references for color grade, exposure and saturation — do NOT copy their buildings, layout or composition. Generate a completely new scene. An empty playground bench beside old swing sets in a Korean apartment complex courtyard, streetlamp poles standing along the path, a narrow alley receding between apartment blocks in the distance. Wide eye-level shot, bench slightly off-center left, gentle depth of field, no people, no faces, no text. Brilliant azure daylight, crisp high-key exposure, vivid clear blue tones throughout.
